sort.title: Balanced Match
sort.legacyDeprecated: The legacy `!sort-old` command is deprecated. Use `/sort` or `!sort` instead.

go.title: Match Deployment
go.success: Teams have been moved to their match channels. Good luck and have fun!

lobby.title: Lobby Update
lobby.success: All players have been moved to **{{channel}}**.

help.title: Available Commands
help.description: Commands are grouped by category. Use `!help <command>` if you want more details about a specific command.

slash.sortDescription: Create balanced teams from the currently connected players.
slash.sortTeamsOption: Optional number of teams to create (defaults to 2).
slash.goDescription: Move the current match teams into their configured voice channels.
slash.lobbyDescription: Move connected players back to the configured lobby channel.
slash.setrankPlayerOption: The Discord user whose rank should be updated.
slash.setrankRankOption: The new rank value to assign.
slash.executedInChannel: The result for {{command}} has been posted in this channel.
